phrases.intent_en: Ask where the convent pastry counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de pastelaria do convento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH DOO koong-VAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The convent pastry counter is a beloved spot for trying traditional conventual sweets, a highlight of any visit to this historic neighborhood.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the Convent of Santa Clara-a-Nova.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the Convent of Santa Clara-a-Nova.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guardian Angel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela do Anjo da Guarda?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOO AHNNG-zhoo DUH GWAH-ruh-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is often overlooked but features unique azulejos.

likely_response.local: Fica no Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the Convent of Santa Clara-a-Nova.

responses.english: It is in the Convent of Santa Clara-a-Nova.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh.
responses.french: Fica no Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guardian Angel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela do Anjo da Guarda?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOO AHNNG-zhoo DUH GWAH-ruh-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: This small chapel is a lesser-known but historically significant landmark in the Santa Clara-a-Nova quarter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the convent gift shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de recordações do Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH rih-koo-ruh-duh-SOHNYSH DOO koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Souvenirs include handmade tiles and convent sweets.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a uma irmã ou ao zelador.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OO-muh ee-ruh-MAHN OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a nun or the caretaker.

responses.english: Ask a nun or the caretaker.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OO-muh ee-ruh-MAHN OHW OW zeh-luh-DOHR.
responses.french: Pergunte a uma irmã ou ao zelador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the convent pastry counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de doces do convento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH DOH-sihsh DOO koong-VAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Try the 'pastéis de Santa Clara' specifically.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sister at the convent.

responses.english: Ask the sister at the convent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mondego viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar o caminho para o Miradouro do Mondego?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Best visited late afternoon for optimal lighting.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mondego Viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mondego Viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Clara-a-Nova Convent is
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Convento de Santa Clara-a-Nova?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW koong-VAYNG-too DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh-AH-NAW-vuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The convent is a key historical site. Entry may require a ticket.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Rua de Santa Clara.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's on Rua de Santa Clara.

responses.english: Good morning, it's on Rua de Santa Clara.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica na Rua de Santa Clara.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela do Anjo da Guarda?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOO AHNNG-zhoo DUH GWAH-ruh-duh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela do Anjo da Guarda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOO AHNNG-zhoo DUH GWAH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Guardian Angel Chapel.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DOO AHNNG-zhoo DUH GWAH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Capela do Anjo da Guarda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mondego viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro do Mondego?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to it simply as the Miradouro. It's a short walk uphill.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mondego viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mondego viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Mondego.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mondego viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Mondego?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO moong-DEH-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers panoramic views of Coimbra and the Mondego River.

likely_response.local: Siga a Rua de Santa Clara até ao fim.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh uh-TEH OW FEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow Rua de Santa Clara to the end.

responses.english: Follow Rua de Santa Clara to the end.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh KLAH-ruh uh-TEH OW FEEN.
responses.french: Siga a Rua de Santa Clara até ao fim.
